sections.heading: EMVCo Associates & Subscribers
sections.bodyMd:
Industry stakeholders, including merchants, banks and technology providers, participate as EMVCo [Associates](https://www.emvco.com/industry-collaboration/emvco-associates-subscribers/associates/) and [Subscribers](https://www.emvco.com/industry-collaboration/emvco-associates-subscribers/subscribers/) to contribute their knowledge and expertise to the development of EMV Specifications.

[Learn more](https://www.emvco.com/industry-collaboration/emvco-associates-subscribers/)
